name: Breadcrumb
purpose: Hierarchical location trail across entity drill-downs such as industry to company to security.

structures.name: Basic Trail
structures.notes: Links use muted color; the current page is foreground and non-interactive.

structures.name: Collapsed Trail
structures.notes: Long paths collapse middle crumbs into an overflow menu.

structures.name: Entity Trail
structures.notes: Maps the four-layer entity model: industry to company to security.

interactionNotes: Only the trailing crumb is bold; separators stay quiet and decorative.
Collapse aggressively on narrow widths to protect the current location.
